description: Academic presentation about neural network analysis of laparoscopic surgical skills at SAGES 2015 conference

teaching_content.educational_value: Presents research on hand motion analysis and neural networks for automated skill assessment in laparoscopic surgery. Shows methodology using chaos neural network systems to distinguish between expert and novice surgeons with 79.3% accuracy.

cannot_score: This is an academic research presentation, not a performance of any FLS task
confidence_rationale: Clear academic presentation slides with research methodology, results, and conclusions. No surgical task performance visible.
